title: apollo THE HOUSEWARES BRAND Bread Board for Cutting, Chopping with Juice Groove, Hevea Wood, 25cm, Natural (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Can also be used as chopping board
Easy to clean with a damp cloth.
Made from strong and durable wood.
description: Discover the versatility of our Apollo Hevea Wood Bread Board, designed for cutting, chopping, and food preparation. This pack of 2 comes with 25cm x 12.9cm boards, featuring a convenient juice groove to catch excess liquids during preparation. Crafted from high-quality Hevea/Rubberwood, known for its dense character and uniform grain, ensuring durability and strength. The non-porous, bacteria-resistant surface is easy to clean, and its natural properties prevent cracking and warping. Perfect for various food types, including bread, cheese, fruit, meat, vegetables, and fish. Customize it with your creativity through laser engraving, crafts, DIY projects, and more. With care instructions of not using a dishwasher, this cutting board is an essential addition to your kitchen.
